sections.title: Team Access · Sorted by Last Login (oldest first)

en.title: Main_Org · Health Overview
en.subtitle: EnGenius Cloud Staging · org_id: 5e410f44...
en.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const SD = 365; const ds = ms => ms ? Math.floor((Date.now()-ms)/86400000) : Infinity; cf.license_summary = (data) => { const inv = data.inventory?.device_candidates || []; const lic = data.licenses?.license_candidates || []; const exp = inv.filter(d => d.license_status === 'expired').length; const need = Math.max(0, exp - lic.length); return `${exp} of ${inv.length} devices have expired licenses; ${lic.length} licenses remain in the org pool. Recommend purchasing ${need} new licenses.`; }; cf.expired_subtext = (data) => { const inv = data.inventory?.device_candidates || []; const exp = inv.filter(d => d.license_status === 'expired').length; if (inv.length === exp && exp > 0) return 'All expired'; return `${exp}/${inv.length} expired`; }; cf.empty_networks_subtext = (data) => { const inv = data.inventory?.device_candidates || []; const hv = data.hierarchy?.network_candidates || []; const ids = new Set(inv.map(d => d.network_id)); return `${hv.length - ids.size} empty networks`; }; cf.stale_members_subtext = (data) => { const m = data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []; return `${m.filter(x => ds(x.last_login_time) > SD).length} users dormant 1y+`; }; })();

sections.title: Team Access · Sorted by Last Login (oldest first)

ja.title: Main_Org · ヘルス概要
ja.subtitle: EnGenius Cloud ステージング · org_id: 5e410f44...
ja.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const SD = 365; const ds = ms => ms ? Math.floor((Date.now()-ms)/86400000) : Infinity; cf.license_summary = (data) => { const inv = data.inventory?.device_candidates || []; const lic = data.licenses?.license_candidates || []; const exp = inv.filter(d => d.license_status === 'expired').length; const need = Math.max(0, exp - lic.length); return `デバイス ${inv.length} 台のうち ${exp} 台のライセンスが期限切れ。ライセンスプールには ${lic.length} 枚残っています。新規 ${need} ライセンスの購入を推奨。`; }; cf.expired_subtext = (data) => { const inv = data.inventory?.device_candidates || []; const exp = inv.filter(d => d.license_status === 'expired').length; if (inv.length === exp && exp > 0) return '全て期限切れ'; return `${exp}/${inv.length} 期限切れ`; }; cf.empty_networks_subtext = (data) => { const inv = data.inventory?.device_candidates || []; const hv = data.hierarchy?.network_candidates || []; const ids = new Set(inv.map(d => d.network_id)); return `${hv.length - ids.size} 個の空ネットワーク`; }; cf.stale_members_subtext = (data) => { const m = data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []; return `${m.filter(x => ds(x.last_login_time) > SD).length} 名 1 年以上未ログイン`; }; })();
